meta_description: Mark Ratcliffe Moving offer a complete domestic and commercial removals and storage service. Working across Weybridge, Cobham and across Surrey. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, our professional team provide a local & national removals, full and part packing, storage and self storage.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Premier Removals in Woking and Surrey

Mark Ratcliffe Moving offer a complete removals and storage service. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, you can put your trust in us to look after your move.

How can we help you today?

Moving Home or Offices? We can make your journey as 'Smooth as Silk'

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Moving

Choosing the right removal company to move your possessions is vital. You need to secure good value, but also be confident that the team arriving at your property or business on the morning have a clear understanding of your requirements, with the necessary training and equipment to ensure a successful and straightforward move.

Mark Ratcliffe is the founder of Mark Ratcliffe Moving and has been working in the UK domestic removals and storage market for over 30 years. Working with customers throughout Woking, Surrey and nationwide with quality at the core of everything we do - it is what we have built our reputation within the moving and storage industry upon. 

Our removal firm are one of just a handful with a dedicated staff training centre with all of our staff being trained to the highest industry standards in packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, moving and wrapping household furniture for home and overseas, as well as vehicle loading and customer services. You can expect the most competitive prices around with the highest industry standards and a real commitment from everyone involved in your move.

Moving home in Woking? Choose a company you can trust 

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving we offer a comprehensive domestic and commercial moving service. Whether you have a 3 piece suite to move across town, or an entire 4 bed house to move up to Scotland, our professional team have the equipment, manpower and skill to move you with ease. 

To begin your moving journey Mark Ratcliffe will visit your home or business at a time convenient for you and carry out an onsite survey and discuss details of your forthcoming move. Packing requirements, insurance cover for your valuable possessions and house clearance can be discussed and arranged if required. We will provide a fixed quotation for our moving, packing and storage services. Then, on your move day a fully trained and uniformed crew will arrive and lay down floor covers to protect carpets, cover exposed banisters and doors etc. If required, they will pack and move your belongings with care and transport them safely to your new home.

Packing Service

Mark Ratcliffe Moving can provide a full packing service or packing of fragile items only. Should you decide to carry out your own packing prior to move day, we provide flat pack moving boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc...all at a minimal cost.

Safe and Secure Self Storage 

We offer secure self storage rooms to rent for customers who prefer to deposit / remove their own goods to / from store. Various size rooms are available with our most popular size being 77 sqft which equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres. We rent this size room at £30 plus vat per week. Our storage rooms are much higher than our local competitors and our charges are over 50% less than the rest. Your valuable possessions will be stored in a secure, damp free and clean environment, with you being the only key holder with great access for loading / unloading.

Whether you are moving within Woking or further afield in the UK, or even abroad, Mark Ratcliffe Moving is ready to help. We can meet all of your wider moving needs, whether you require domestic removals or commercial removals, our services include secure storage, export packing and house clearance. We would be delighted to give you a quote without any obligation. Please contact our team today to talk through your moving requirements - our opening hours are Mon - Sat 08.30 - 17.00 or by appointment for any other time including Sundays. A 24/7 Service for our Self Store Customers.
